scanner_go_line_rangesState.description: State model derived from scanner_go_line_ranges TLA+ spec

LineNumberCorrect.message:
LineNumberCorrect violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        /\ s.line_num >= 1
        /\ s.line_num <= N
        /\ Lines[s.line_num] = "Func"
LineNumberCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant LineNumberCorrect from scanner_go_line_ranges spec

InterfaceExclusion.message:
InterfaceExclusion violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        \A k \in 1..N :
            (s.line_num = k) => Lines[k] = "Func"
InterfaceExclusion.description: Verifier for invariant InterfaceExclusion from scanner_go_line_ranges spec

NoGaps.message:
NoGaps violation: (i > N) =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            (Lines[k] = "Func" /\ ~InInterface(k)) =>
                \E s \in ske...
NoGaps.description: Verifier for invariant NoGaps from scanner_go_line_ranges spec

CursorBounded.description: Verifier for invariant CursorBounded from scanner_go_line_ranges spec

assert_LineNumberCorrect.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        and s.line_num >= 1
        and s.line_num <= N
        and Lines[s.line_num] = "Func"
assert_LineNumberCorrect.message:
Assertion failed: LineNumberCorrect — \A s \in skeletons :
        /\ s.line_num >= 1
        /\ s.line_num <= N
        /\ Lines[s.line_num] = "Func"
assert_LineNumberCorrect.description: Test assertion for LineNumberCorrect from scanner_go_line_ranges spec

assert_InterfaceExclusion.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        \A k in 1..N :
            (s.line_num = k) implies Lines[k] = "Func"
assert_InterfaceExclusion.message:
Assertion failed: InterfaceExclusion — \A s \in skeletons :
        \A k \in 1..N :
            (s.line_num = k) => Lines[k] = "Func"
assert_InterfaceExclusion.description: Test assertion for InterfaceExclusion from scanner_go_line_ranges spec

assert_NoGaps.condition:
(i > N) implies
        \A k in 1..N :
            (Lines[k] = "Func" and ~InInterface(k)) implies
                \E s in skeletons : s.line_num = k

assert_NoGaps.description: Test assertion for NoGaps from scanner_go_line_ranges spec
